texto: Today I know that I cannot control the ocean tides. I can only go with the flow.... When I struggle and try to organize the Atlantic to my specifications I sink. If I flail and thrash and growl and grumble I go under. But if I let go and float I am borne aloft.
explicacao: Citação de Marie Stilkind sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Today I know that I cannot control the ocean tides. I can only go with the flow.... When I strugg…” articula reflexao, acceptance, today em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
